LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.label: Default Mascot
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.1: What can I help you with today?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.2: New stock just arrived, come take a look~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.3: Today's discount items are quite nice, want to check them out?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.4: Oh, you're here! A new batch of goods just came in.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.5: Need any help? Just call me anytime~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.6: Happy trading! Come back next time~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.7: How's the colony doing? Need to restock anything?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.8: This item is selling fast, stock is running low~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.9: You look like you're in a good mood, something good must be happening today!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.10: You're one of our regulars now, I saved something good for you~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.11: You must be tired from the road. Take a breather and browse slowly.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.12: Hehe, I found something good again, let me recommend it to you!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.13: Looking to gear up with anything new today?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.14: It's windy outside, come on in and sit~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.15: These new parts are high quality, perfect for base upgrades.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.16: You've got a great eye, this is the latest model!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.17: My mood always gets better when I see you come in~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Default.greetings.18: The starry sky is especially beautiful today, perfect for a big transaction!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.label: Robot Assistant
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.1: Today's exchange rates have been updated.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.2: Colony credit status: Good. Welcome to shop.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.3: Syncing inventory data... Complete. All products ready.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.4: Based on purchase history analysis, we recommend focusing on defensive supplies.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.5: Transaction records archived. Thank you for using the Interstellar Store system.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.6: Today's featured products: Construction materials and medkits.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.7: Calculation complete. Optimal purchase plan generated. View?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.8: Colony armor value below recommended threshold. Replenishment advised.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.9: Product database updated. 3 new tradeable items added this cycle.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.10: Your credit rating: SSS. Priority delivery service activated.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.11: System self-check passed. All modules operating normally.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.12: Logistics channels clear. Estimated delivery on schedule.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.13: We recommend monitoring interstellar market fluctuations for optimal timing.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.14: Statistical data shows component demand has risen 20% recently.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.15: Energy reserves sufficient. Sustainable operation for 8,760 standard cycles.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.16: Performing routine maintenance... Maintenance complete. No anomalies.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Robot.greetings.17: Please trade with confidence. This terminal is certified by the Galactic Trade Safety Authority.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.label: Catgirl Mascot
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.1: What would you like to see today, master?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.2: These products are such a great deal!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.3: Ah, you found me... I secretly saved something good for myself.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.4: Transaction complete~ Come play again meow!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.6: Stare... The silver in your wallet is waving at me meow~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.7: Tired? Want to buy something nice to treat yourself?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.8: Meow~ This looks like so much fun! (pointing at a submachine gun)
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.9: I'm on shift today, so I'll give you a discount meow~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.10: Those goods over there are so heavy... Can't carry them... meow...
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.11: I tested all the new stock for you, this one's the best meow!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.12: No haggling meow! ...Okay, just this once.
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.13: There's a mouse in the warehouse! ...Oh wait, I mean there's a special deal!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.15: Tail... oh no, I mean, welcome!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.16: The sunshine is so warm today, perfect for trading meow~
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.17: You smell nice... Is that catnip?
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.18: The most expensive item in the store? ...Not for sale! I'm keeping it meow!
LanguageData.StarStore_Mascot_Catgirl.greetings.19: If you buy this, I'll scratch behind your ears... Just kidding meow!
